{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204550054749267B4FA88FC980C"}"},"total":14418},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7246757668341580547","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔很好，而且作者的角度应该是比多数人独特的，用语比较含蓄，但比较精准，吸引人，情节不能说跌宕起伏，但很温馨，很真实，往往就是一些细节比较使人感动。比较推荐，支持一下。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687267387,"group_id":"7208495606224915508","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"记录一下下，幻想一下下","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7zpTsQ5JY3D/DPFcLlA1jA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d7f27d4078f14ea0b53d2fcb5a90e835~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701300&x-signature=uxL2LEUzCgyhJHxXuUZO8cyknus%3D","user_id":"333847143645955","user_name":"鹅相尔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"333847143645955","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7208495606224915508","book_info":{"abstract":"“我不喜欢你……我拒绝！”
　　江澈表白失败、高考失意、人生一落千丈……
　   一场意外，让他重生回到十八岁高考前夕。
　　这一次，江澈选择不再做舔狗。
　　可江澈离开之后，拒绝了他表白的青梅校花苏蓉音却是追了上来。
　　“江澈，你为什么不理我？”
　　“江澈，我们还做朋友好不好？”
　　“江澈，我错了，我是喜欢你的，我接受你的表白……”
　　江澈双手抱着后脑勺：“表白你拒绝，我走了，你又追什么？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a72ae59bac4919d5db263675d34bfd3a","author":"小能软糖","author_id":"","book_id":"7208495606224915508","book_name":"我养成超可爱女友后，校花急哭了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#908880","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7208502612348863036","read_count":"70295","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1282486"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"930","tags":"都市种田,都市,重生,多女主,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/aef5a3beb369df94e86133f3cf76166e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779310500&x-signature=jJ5j8nU%2BSJMZMKhDM8DXT3n1%2BKM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4154367782945223","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.6081926e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204550054749267B4FA88FC980C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":28,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":26081,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":65988},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1687331322,"author_reply_time":1687331320,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7244460964384916264","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看确实好看，对人物描写和动作描写，还有个个细节都很不错，感觉又不是那种沾花惹草，有分寸，只有一个女主，虽然这样的女生是幻想里才会出现的，但确实很喜欢这样的也对自己会遇到这样的女生抱有一些期望，更多的是能遇到一个自己能全力付出，对方也会接受的对象不分男女，这里也写了独立女性这样的话题，说的很有道理，总之希望作者多写，后面的剧情也不要降低水分[爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686732603,"group_id":"7208495606224915508","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3IDeHfliJbBlq+qMfg8maraVjb3grZdd3L/8ZszZAlh","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a64f9934ac3f49d582539a3914c6fdc0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708387&x-signature=TFQ7MdGVPScqE9zyuOFyFK6D9ak%3D","user_id":"1838023683616237","user_name":"初梦月烎"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1838023683616237","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7208495606224915508","book_info":{"abstract":"“我不喜欢你……我拒绝！”
